calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Gursharan Kaur, for Gabriel Au-Chan, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel presented oral argument to support their position regarding venue issue and additional requests within the instant petition. After additional discussion, and a brief recess, Judge Roeca discloses that he previously represented counsel's law firm, no objections are presented. The subject matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Ramirez. Not Reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Continued To Dec-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
